# Fast Piggie — Randomized Image Slot Assignment

**Goal:**
When fewer than 6 images are displayed, they should appear in random slots, not just the first N.

**Instructions:**

- Update the image rendering logic in app/games/fast-piggie/game.js so that each round, the images are assigned to random slots.
- Ensure the number of images per round is unchanged, but their positions are randomized.
- Update or add tests in app/games/fast-piggie/tests/ to verify random slot assignment.

**Verification:**

- Observe image slot assignment: Fewer than 6 images appear in random slots each round.
- All tests pass with 100% function coverage.
